common.reference_data: *Reference data: 400 gait cycles from healthy adults aged 20-40
common.reference_data_value: : 400 gait cycles from healthy adults aged 20-40

m20.basic_info_desc: Basic information including patient and robot details, and applied settings.
m20.summary_desc: Summary of the gait analysis results.
m20.spatiotemporal_banner_desc: Analysis results of spatial and temporal relationships during walking.
m20.asymmetry_note_desc: : Difference between right and left measurements. Indicates the degree of asymmetry.
m20.asymmetry_formula: Asymmetry Index = (|Right - Left| / Average of Right and Left) x 100%
m20.walking_speed_desc:
Calculated by the distance walked per second, indicating the speed of walking.
Walking speed(m/s) = Step length(m) x Cadence(steps/min) / 60s
m20.cadence_desc:
Indicates how many steps were taken per minute.
Cadence(steps/min) = Total steps / Measurement time(min)
m20.stance_phase_desc: The average proportion of the stance phase during the gait cycle
m20.swing_phase_desc: The average proportion of the swing phase during the gait cycle
m20.joint_kinematic_banner_desc: Analysis results of joint motion patterns during walking.
m20.rom_description: The joint range of motion is calculated using the average of each joint's ROM appearing in the gait cycles. Positive values(+) indicate flexion angles, negative values(-) indicate extension angles. Range = Max angle - Min angle
m20.joint_motion_desc: The graph shows the change in range of motion at each joint based on 100% gait cycle.
m20.vertical_line_note: : Average swing phase start point in gait cycle (%)
m20.gray_area_note: : Reference data range measured from healthy subjects
m20.gait_index_desc: A higher gait index value indicates a greater difference between the patient's measured joint angle and healthy subjects.
m20.gvs_desc:
*Gait Variable Scores-Angel Legs: Gait variable scores measured using Angel Legs.
RMS difference between the reference joint angles from healthy subjects and the patient's measured joint angles.
m20.gps_desc:
*Gait Profile Score-Angel Legs: Gait profile score measured using Angel Legs.
Average of hip and knee GVS-AL scores from right and left legs.
m20.cyclogram_desc:
A cyclogram is an inter-joint coordinate representation composed of two joint angle data sets,
showing the interaction between lower limb joints.

pro.basic_info_desc: Basic information including patient and robot details, and applied settings.
pro.total_ratio_note: : Indicates the ratio of actual assist torque to preset values.
pro.total_ratio_note2: At 100%, the same assist torque as the preset value is applied to the wearer's joints.
pro.max_assist_note: : Indicates the instantaneous maximum of actual assist force with total ratio applied.
pro.rom_description: ROM is calculated from the average of joint ROMs in analyzed gait cycles.
pro.gvs_as_desc: GVS-AS (Gait Variable Score-Angular Sagittal) indicates deviation from normal gait pattern.
pro.hip_motion_desc: Shows the change in range of motion at the hip joint over 100% gait cycle.
pro.hip_torque_desc: Shows torque changes applied to hip joint over 100% gait cycle.
pro.vertical_line_note: : Average swing phase onset in gait cycle (%)
pro.gray_area_note: : Reference data range measured from healthy subjects
pro.joint_kinematic_banner_desc: Analysis results of joint motion patterns during walking.
